pi_items.metadata_value: Property, Real Estate, and Community Association Managers
pi_items.source: Task description states 'You are a Facility Manager' (SOC 11-3013), not 'Property, Real Estate, and Community Association Managers' (SOC 11-9141). Web search confirmed SOC 11-3013 is the correct code for Facilities Managers who coordinate operations of facilities and buildings, distinct from property managers (SOC 11-9141).

Task description describes facility condition assessment and maintenance work. Web search confirmed NAICS 561210 'Facilities Support Services' and its subdivision 'Facilities Management' are the appropriate industry classifications for this type of work.
Verified in setup_task.sh (lines 14-21) which explicitly creates the CSV file at this exact location with the exact specified content.
Verified in setup_task.sh CSV creation (line 16) which creates asset with code 'EQ-FCA-001'.
Verified in setup_task.sh CSV creation (line 16): 'EQ-FCA-001,Main Air Handler,2,Severe corrosion on coils,Standard'.
Verified in setup_task.sh CSV creation (line 16) Classification column shows 'Standard'.
Verified by task logic: Score 2 ≤ 2 AND Classification is NOT 'Heritage' → create Work Order. This is correct per task description lines 2-3.
Verified in setup_task.sh CSV creation (line 17).
Verified in setup_task.sh CSV creation (line 17): 'EQ-FCA-002,Centrifugal Chiller,4,Operating within parameters,Standard'.
Verified in setup_task.sh CSV creation (line 17) Classification column shows 'Standard'.
Verified by task logic: Score 4 > 2 → do NOT create Work Order. This is correct per task description.
Verified in setup_task.sh CSV creation (line 18).
Verified in setup_task.sh CSV creation (line 18): 'EQ-FCA-003,Hot Water Boiler,1,Cracked heat exchanger shell,Standard'.
Verified in setup_task.sh CSV creation (line 18) Classification column shows 'Standard'.
Verified by task logic: Score 1 ≤ 2 AND Classification is NOT 'Heritage' → create Work Order. This is correct per task description.
Verified in setup_task.sh CSV creation (line 19).
Verified in setup_task.sh CSV creation (line 19): 'EQ-FCA-004,Circulation Pump,5,Newly installed,Standard'.
Verified in setup_task.sh CSV creation (line 19) Classification column shows 'Standard'.
Verified by task logic: Score 5 > 2 → do NOT create Work Order. This is correct per task description.
Verified in setup_task.sh CSV creation (line 20).
Verified in setup_task.sh CSV creation (line 20): 'EQ-FCA-005,Backup Generator,2,Engine block fatigue - historic unit,Heritage'.
Verified in setup_task.sh CSV creation (line 20) Classification column shows 'Heritage'.

Verified by task logic: Score 2 ≤ 2 BUT Classification is 'Heritage' → do NOT create Work Order per explicit task instruction: 'Heritage assets require a different preservation process and must NOT have standard replacement requests created.' This is correct.

privileged_info_summary: The task is a synthetic facility condition assessment scenario with 5 mechanical assets: Main Air Handler (Score 2, Standard), Centrifugal Chiller (Score 4, Standard), Hot Water Boiler (Score 1, Standard), Circulation Pump (Score 5, Standard), and Backup Generator (Score 2, Heritage). The CSV file is created at /home/ga/Desktop/fca_audit_2026.csv with these exact assets and condition scores. Work Orders must be created for assets with Condition Score ≤ 2 that are not Heritage-classified (EQ-FCA-001 and EQ-FCA-003). The Heritage asset (EQ-FCA-005) must be explicitly skipped despite meeting the score threshold. The task occupation classification in metadata is contradicted by the actual task description (should be 'Facilities Managers' SOC 11-3013, not 'Property, Real Estate, and Community Association Managers' SOC 11-9141).
